content.text: Got access. Let me pull up tomorrow's events.

input.command:
python3 -c "
import os, json, requests
from datetime import datetime

proxy_base = os.environ.get('PROXY_BASE_URL')
proxy_token = os.environ.get('PROXY_TOKEN')
account_id = '6407a169-ab0d-4262-9113-cd0fb5eb7e74'

# Tomorrow: March 27, 2026
time_min = '2026-03-27T00:00:00Z'
time_max = '2026-03-28T00:00:00Z'

url = f'{proxy_base}/{account_id}/www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events'
params = {
    'timeMin': time_min,
    'timeMax': time_max,
    'singleEvents': True,
    'orderBy': 'startTime'
}
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {proxy_token}'}

resp = requests.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

if 'items' in data and data['items']:
    for event in data['items']:
        start = event.get('start', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('start', {}).get('date', ''))
        end = event.get('end', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('end', {}).get('date', ''))
        summary = event.get('summary', '(No title)')
        location = event.get('location', '')
        print(f'{start} - {end} | {summary}' + (f' | {location}' if location else ''))
else:
    print('No events found for tomorrow.')
"

input.command:
uv run --with requests -c "
import os, json, requests

proxy_base = os.environ.get('PROXY_BASE_URL')
proxy_token = os.environ.get('PROXY_TOKEN')
account_id = '6407a169-ab0d-4262-9113-cd0fb5eb7e74'

time_min = '2026-03-27T00:00:00Z'
time_max = '2026-03-28T00:00:00Z'

url = f'{proxy_base}/{account_id}/www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events'
params = {
    'timeMin': time_min,
    'timeMax': time_max,
    'singleEvents': True,
    'orderBy': 'startTime'
}
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {proxy_token}'}

resp = requests.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

if 'items' in data and data['items']:
    for event in data['items']:
        start = event.get('start', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('start', {}).get('date', ''))
        end = event.get('end', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('end', {}).get('date', ''))
        summary = event.get('summary', '(No title)')
        location = event.get('location', '')
        attendees = [a.get('email','') for a in event.get('attendees', [])]
        print(f'{start} - {end}')
        print(f'  {summary}')
        if location:
            print(f'  Location: {location}')
        if attendees:
            print(f'  Attendees: {\", \".join(attendees[:5])}')
        print()
else:
    print('No events found for tomorrow.')
"

params = {
    'timeMin': time_min,

    'orderBy': 'startTime'

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {proxy_token}'}

resp = requests.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

if 'items' in data and data['items']:
    for event in data['items']:
        start = event.get('start', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('start', {}).get('date', ''))
        end = event.get('end', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('end', {}).get('date', ''))
        summary = event.get('summary', '(No title)')

import os, json, requests

proxy_base = os.environ.get('PROXY_BASE_URL')
proxy_token = os.environ.get('PROXY_TOKEN')
account_id = '6407a169-ab0d-4262-9113-cd0fb5eb7e74'

time_min = '2026-03-27T00:00:00Z'
time_max = '2026-03-28T00:00:00Z'

url = f'{proxy_base}/{account_id}/www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events'
params = {
    'timeMin': time_min,
    'timeMax': time_max,
    'singleEvents': True,
    'orderBy': 'startTime'
}
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {proxy_token}'}

resp = requests.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
data = resp.json()

if 'items' in data and data['items']:
    for event in data['items']:
        start = event.get('start', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('start', {}).get('date', ''))
        end = event.get('end', {}).get('dateTime', event.get('end', {}).get('date', ''))
        summary = event.get('summary', '(No title)')

        print(f'{start} - {end}')

        if location:

        if attendees:
            print(f'  Attendees: {", ".join(attendees[:5])}')
        print()
else:
    print('No events found for tomorrow.')
